allow: PowerShell($handles = @\(\); Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -match "teensy|arduino|visual studio|code" } | Select-Object Name, Id, MainWindowTitle)

PowerShell($env:PATH -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "node|npm|nvm" }; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)
